title: Plasmid Extraction
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"att97","text":"This protocol is used for extracting plasmid from E. coli DH5-Alpha strains. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"26elb","text":"The manual from manufacturer is provided here. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"147q1","text":"  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"9g70b","text":"This protocol is usually performed after overnight incubation of bacteria in a centrifuge tube. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"file","mutability":"","data":{"forceSelection":true,"guid":"5037C600342A11EEAFD10A58A9FEAC02","nestedSelector":null,"original_name":"Presto™ Mini Plasmid Kit.pdf","placeholder":"/img/extensions/pdf.png","source":"https://content.protocols.io/public/ee4c05f4d11acc65c6ba9cea57d5a8873b8b0ab738143423fc1706a409a8c740/cdgpbcfhx.pdf"}}}}
steps: Set the dry bath incubator at 37 °C
Take out the centrifuge tube containing medium with bacteria that has been cultured overnight.
Centrifuge the centrifuge tube under this condition - 15000 x g, °C, 6 minutes .
Discard the supernatent Recommendation: Keep the bacterial pellet away from supernatent if plausible to insure minimum loss of bacteria.
Add 200 µL of PD1 reagent to the centrifuge tube. Vortex the tube to completely mix bacterial pellet with PD1.
Add 200 µL of PD2 reagent to the centrifuge tube. Shake the tube gently and let it stand for 00:02:00 to 00:05:00 . Warning: Do not vortex the mixture after adding PD2!!!!

Add 300 µL of PD3 reagent to the centrifuge tube. Shake the tube gently and centrifuge the tube under this condition - 16000 x g, °C, 10 minutes . Warning: Do not vortex the mixture after adding PD3!!!! Tips: Prepare the PDH column when centrifuging.

After centrifugation, transfer the supernatent into a PDH column and discard the pellet. Centrifuge the PDH column under 15000 x g, °C, 30 seconds and discard the flowthrough liquid in the collection tube.
Add 400 µL of Wash 1 Buffer into the PDH column and centrifuge under 15000 x g, °C, 30 seconds . Discard the flowthrough in the collection tube.
Add 600 µL of Wash 2 Buffer into the PDH column and centrifuge under 15000 x g, °C, 30 seconds . Discard the flowthrough in the collection tube.

Add 50 µL of Elution Buffer into the middle of PDH column and incubate the PDH column in a drybath incubater under 37 °C . Recommendation: Add the Elution Buffer directly onto the silicon membrane to insure optimal euting efficacy.
Centrifuge again under 15000 x g, °C, 3 minutes and replace the collection tube with a new eppendorf. (Discard the flowthrough)
Centrifuge under 15000 x g, °C, 2 minutes . The flowthrough in the eppendorf contains plasmids derived from the cultured bacteria. Recommedation: Proceed to measure the concentration of plasmid.
creator: Huan Jui Chang
